reference: Sometimes the preventers are not able to prevent the symptoms. You can add an antihistamine; you can safely add montelukast five milligrams three times a day for two to three weeks. You can add liquid antacid, such as Ulgel, two teaspoons three times a day to counter any effects of reflux, which can also present with this kind of symptoms.
text: Sometimes the preventers are not able to prevent the symptoms. You can add an antihistamine. You can safely add Montelukast 5 mg 3 times a day for 2-3 weeks. You can add liquid antacid, such as Olgel, 2 teaspoons 3 times a day to counter any effects of reflux, which can also present with this kind of symptoms.
